data.title: Itaú Unibanco Publishes Final Voting Map from April 28, 2026 Online AGM
data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Itau Unibanco ( (ITUB) ).

Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for April 2026, reporting on its corporate governance events and regulatory disclosures as a foreign issuer. The filing confirms the bank continues to report under Form 20-F and is not relying on paper submissions or the Rule 12g3-2(b) exemption.

The submission includes the final detailed voting map from the Annual General Stockholders’ Meeting held exclusively online on April 28, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. in São Paulo. By publishing this consolidated breakdown of remote and live votes on each agenda item, Itaú Unibanco is aligning with Brazilian CVM Resolution 81/22, underscoring its commitment to voting transparency and providing shareholders and market participants greater visibility into governance decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (ITUB) stock is a Buy with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Itau Unibanco stock, see the ITUB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ITUB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ITUB is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (growth and ROE) but held back by leverage and cash-flow volatility. Technicals are supportive with a strong uptrend, though momentum looks somewhat stretched. Valuation is favorable given the moderate P/E and high dividend yield, and the latest earnings call reinforced constructive fundamentals with cautious but reasonable 2026 guidance.

To see Spark’s full report on ITUB stock, click here.

More about Itau Unibanco

Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. is a leading Brazilian financial institution operating as a universal bank, with activities spanning retail, wholesale, and investment banking. The group focuses on serving individuals, small and medium-sized enterprises, and large corporations in Brazil and abroad, and its shares are listed in both the Brazilian and U.S. capital markets.

Headquartered in São Paulo, the bank plays a central role in Latin America’s financial system and is closely followed by international investors due to its scale, governance structure, and regular reporting under U.S. securities regulations.

data.title: Prisma Properties AGM Backs Board, Withholds Dividend and Expands Capital Mandates
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Prisma Properties AB ( (SE:PRISMA) ) is now available.

Prisma Properties AB’s 2026 annual general meeting in Stockholm approved the 2025 income statements and balance sheets for the parent company and group, as well as the board’s remuneration report. The meeting also resolved that no dividend will be paid for the financial year 2025, with retained earnings carried forward and the board and CEO discharged from liability.

Shareholders re-elected all five board members, with Simon de Château confirmed again as chairman, while both he and director Jacob Annehed declined their board and committee fees. The AGM reappointed Ernst & Young as auditor and granted the board broad authority to issue new shares and other instruments and to repurchase up to 10% of the company’s own shares, providing financial flexibility for future capital raising and balance-sheet management.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:PRISMA) stock is a Buy with a SEK33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prisma Properties AB stock, see the SE:PRISMA Stock Forecast page.

More about Prisma Properties AB

Prisma Properties AB is a Stockholm-based real estate company, with operations organized through a parent company and group structure. The firm is overseen by a five-member board and audited by Ernst & Young, reflecting a governance framework typical for listed Nordic property groups.

Average Trading Volume: 138,637

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK4.18B

data.title: Edenor Raises Tender Cap After Oversubscribed Offer for 2030 Notes
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Edenor SA ( (EDN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Edenor reported early tender results for its cash tender offer targeting its 9.75% Senior Notes due 2030, originally capped at US$150 million out of US$475 million outstanding. Strong demand led the company to raise the tender cap to US$175 million, signaling active liability management and investor appetite for early repurchase at a premium.

By the early tender deadline, holders had tendered about US$270.4 million, of which US$175 million was accepted for purchase at US$1,020 per US$1,000 in principal plus accrued interest, with the oversubscribed offer settled on a prorated basis. The withdrawal period closed on April 28, 2026, an early settlement was slated for April 30, 2026, and no final settlement date was planned, underscoring Edenor’s prompt execution of its debt reduction plan.

The most recent analyst rating on (EDN) stock is a Hold with a $36.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Edenor SA stock, see the EDN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EDN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EDN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by financial performance risks—especially deteriorating free cash flow, higher leverage, and weaker 2025 operating profit—despite strong recent revenue growth. Technicals are supportive (price above major moving averages with positive momentum), and valuation is favorable given the low P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on EDN stock, click here.

More about Edenor SA

Empresa Distribuidora y Comercializadora Norte S.A. (Edenor) is an Argentine electricity distribution and marketing company serving the northern area of Buenos Aires. It issues foreign-currency debt in international capital markets, using notes placements and liability management operations as key tools in its funding and balance-sheet strategy.

data.title: Jyong Biotech Delays Annual 20-F (Yearly Report)
data.description:
Jyong Biotech Ltd. ( (MENS) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Jyong Biotech Ltd. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors of a delay in submitting its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company stresses that this is a timing issue affecting its annual filing, not an indication of deeper regulatory non-compliance, and confirms that all other required reports over the past 12 months have been filed.

The company attributes the delay mainly to needing additional time to finalize its audited financial statements and related disclosures for the Form 20-F (Yearly Report). Management indicates that filing within the standard deadline would have required unreasonable effort or expense, suggesting that the audit and disclosure work is still ongoing but nearing completion.

Jyong Biotech says it expects to file the delayed Form 20-F (Yearly Report) no later than the 15th calendar day after the original due date. This timeline is in line with the grace period allowed under SEC rules when a Form 12b-25 is properly submitted, and it gives investors a near-term window for when the full annual report should become available.

The company does not anticipate any significant changes in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year based on the information currently available. However, it cautions that the final numbers could still change as its independent registered public accounting firm completes the audit, and it flags that all such expectations are forward-looking statements subject to the usual risks and uncertainties.

Jyong Biotech emphasizes its intention to complete the audit, finalize its disclosures and return to timely filing of future periodic reports with the SEC. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer and Chairwoman of the Board Fu-Feng Kuo, dated April 29, 2026, underscoring executive-level responsibility for the late filing and the remediation steps underway.

More about Jyong Biotech Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 254,242

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $163.5M

For a thorough assessment of MENS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pasquarelli Auto Posts Double-Digit Growth and Renews Governance Through 2028
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Pasquarelli Auto SpA ( (IT:PSQ) ) is now available.

Pasquarelli Auto’s shareholders approved the 2025 separate financial statements and reviewed the consolidated accounts, confirming strong top-line growth and profitability. Revenues at the parent company rose 15.4% to €415.7 million, EBITDA increased 16.8% to €11 million and net profit climbed 8.9% to €3.3 million, while the profit was fully allocated to an extraordinary reserve, signaling a focus on strengthening equity.

The meeting also renewed the group’s governance for 2026–2028, appointing a seven-member board of directors dominated by the Pasquarelli family and naming a new Board of Statutory Auditors. RSM S.p.A. was engaged as the new auditing firm for the next three financial years, reinforcing the company’s control and oversight framework as it continues to expand in the Italian mobility and automotive distribution market.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:PSQ) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pasquarelli Auto SpA stock, see the IT:PSQ Stock Forecast page.

More about Pasquarelli Auto SpA

Pasquarelli Auto S.p.A. is an Italian mobility provider active in the trade of new and used cars and commercial vehicles, including through its SecondLife brand. The company also offers short-, medium- and long-term vehicle rentals, as well as service and spare parts sales, and is listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market.

The publication of the interim report underscores MAIRE’s ongoing commitment to timely financial reporting as it advances its engineering and technology activities in the energy, chemicals and fertilizers markets. data.title: Eurotech shareholders approve 2025 results, renew governance and arm board with €20 million capital mandate
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Eurotech S.p.A. ( (IT:ETH) ) is now available.

Eurotech’s shareholders approved the 2025 financial statements, which showed a decline in consolidated revenues to €55.4 million and a reduced but still negative EBIT of €-8.5 million, with the parent company posting an €8.4 million loss carried forward. The meeting also endorsed the remuneration report, renewed authorisation for the purchase and disposal of treasury shares, and approved a one-off increase in audit fees.

Governance was overhauled with the appointment of a seven-member board led by new chairman Luca di Giacomo, alongside a new Board of Statutory Auditors, all drawn from a list proposed by major shareholder Emera S.r.l., which holds 32.77% of Eurotech. In extraordinary session, shareholders also delegated the board to execute a share capital increase of up to €20 million over three years, which could be carried out in tranches and with exclusion of pre-emptive rights, providing financial flexibility to support the company’s strategic and capital needs despite ongoing losses.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ETH) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eurotech S.p.A. stock, see the IT:ETH Stock Forecast page.

More about Eurotech S.p.A.

Eurotech S.p.A., based in Amaro, Italy, operates in the technology and industrial electronics sector, developing embedded systems and edge computing solutions for applications such as industrial automation, transportation and the Internet of Things. The company focuses on supplying hardware and software platforms that enable connected, data-driven services for global OEMs and system integrators.

Average Trading Volume: 348,376

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €53.56M

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Itau Unibanco ( (ITUB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Itaú Unibanco held its Annual General Stockholders’ Meeting online, with a high turnout representing 92.27% of common shares and 45.25% of preferred shares, to approve 2025 financial statements and key governance matters. The fully virtual format followed Brazilian securities rules and underscores the bank’s ongoing adoption of remote corporate governance practices.

Shareholders approved the 2025 accounts and the allocation of R$45.66 billion in profit, including R$33.70 billion in dividends and interest on capital, much of which had already been paid in advance, and further allocations to legal and statutory reserves. The meeting also re-elected the entire 13-member board, confirmed several independent directors, and renewed the Supervisory Council, signaling continuity in Itaú Unibanco’s governance and strategic direction through the 2027 AGM cycle.

Panache Digilife Ltd. ( (IN:PANACHE) ) has issued an announcement.

Panache Digilife Ltd. announced that its board of directors has approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, at a meeting held on April 29, 2026. The company reported that its statutory auditor, Jain Salia & Associates, issued an unmodified opinion on these results, indicating no qualifications or adverse remarks, which supports the credibility of its reported performance and may reassure investors and other stakeholders about the integrity of its financial disclosures.

The board meeting, which ran from noon to 8 p.m., fulfilled key requirements under Regulations 30 and 33 of the SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015. By emphasizing compliance and the clean audit opinion, Panache Digilife signals a continued focus on transparent reporting, a factor that can influence market perception and regulatory confidence in the company’s financial governance.

data.title: BBVA Files Updated Amended and Restated Bylaws with U.S. SEC
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Banco Bilbao ( (BBVA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria, S.A. has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for April 2026, providing investors with an English translation of its amended and restated corporate bylaws. The filing, dated April 29, 2026, formally updates the bank’s foundational governance document, detailing its corporate purpose, share capital structure, shareholders’ rights, and the roles and powers of its general meeting and board of directors, and is incorporated by reference into several of BBVA’s existing U.S. registration statements, underscoring its ongoing compliance obligations to international investors.

By setting out a comprehensive framework that covers capital changes, specialized share classes, general meeting procedures, director requirements, remuneration and board organization, the updated bylaws clarify BBVA’s internal rules and future decision-making processes for shareholders and regulators. The move may strengthen BBVA’s governance transparency and alignment with applicable Spanish and U.S. securities regulations, potentially supporting investor confidence and facilitating future capital markets activity under its shelf and employee share plans already registered in the United States.

The most recent analyst rating on (BBVA) stock is a Buy with a $23.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banco Bilbao stock, see the BBVA Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BBVA is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong underlying profitability and improved leverage (financial performance) alongside a very constructive earnings outlook and shareholder-return focus from the latest call. Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria, S.A. (BBVA) is a Spanish multinational banking group headquartered in Madrid and registered at Calle Azul 4, 28050 Madrid. The group operates as a universal bank, offering retail and corporate banking, investment and financial services across multiple jurisdictions, and its shares are registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.
